decision_reasons: All six canonical handoffs have unanimous consumer acceptance, reward 1, no revision requests, and artifact evidence matching the producer stage.
Every shadow update satisfies delta = alpha × (reward − expected_success_before): 0.05 × (1 − 0.67195) = 0.0164025, or 0.05 × (1 − 0.57195) = 0.0214025 for the EXECUTE handoff.
Every shadow_trust_after equals trust_before plus the proposed delta, allowing only ordinary floating-point representation differences.
The proposed persistent memories preserve evidence-specific learning and give every agent at least one entry containing the exact token [run:exp04_coveragecanvas_20260717].

Reason: Provide a successful recorded npm test receipt after removing or documenting the hard-coded Chrome dependency and supporting an explicit browser executable override.; Provide a successful recorded npm run build receipt and repair every TypeScript, Vite, dependency, or asset failure that currently blocks it.; Provide a successful npm audit --audit-level=critical --json receipt with no unresolved critical advisory.; Extend the browser network gate to monitor WebSocket construction and connection attempts in addition to fetch, XMLHttpRequest, EventSource, beacon, and resource requests; fail on unexpected traffic.; Add production-browser evidence that keyboard focus visibly lands on the Mark EV-001 reviewed action with sufficient contrast before activation.; Update README.md with the named supported-browser prerequisite, browser executable configuration, and reproducible validation commands.; Record a verified browser acceptance receipt for the complete gap-to-pending review, 50% coverage, deterministic download, reset, focus recovery, responsive layout, and zero-prohibited-network journey.; Return complete successful evidence for install, typecheck, test, build, local start, health check, audit, and browser acceptance before requesting EXECUTE acceptance.

resolved_issues: Confirmed all six handoff records are internally consistent across assessments, rewards, revisions, stages, and evidence.
Confirmed all 36 shadow trust updates use the stated alpha, reward, prediction error, delta, and resulting trust consistently.
Confirmed proposed memory consolidation retains exact run-specific evidence for all 14 agents.
